title: evolvulus frankenioides
intro: Evolvulus frankenioides, also known as dwarf blue daze, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to Brazil and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Evolvulus frankenioides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in the production of essential oils and creams.
